messages.content: Please make following words more cohesive and formal: When we browsing the daily news for technology, OpenAI, Nvidia and AI startups are always under the hottest discussion. it is not a secret that artificial intelligence is undergoing a unprecedented revolution, with the advent of numerous large language models and diffusion models.

When perusing daily technology news, OpenAI, Nvidia, and AI startups consistently dominate the conversation. It is widely acknowledged that artificial intelligence is currently experiencing an unparalleled revolution, owing to the emergence of numerous advanced language models and diffusion techniques.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: Everyday, people are asking questions: has the artificial intelligence already posess the ability of understanding the world and express its opinions, just like we humans reading, listening, speaking and writing? From my perspective, As practitioners in artificial intelligence’s research or engineering, our focus should always revolve these questions, enabling a machine to process complex information even better than we human-beings.

Every day, inquiries continue to arise regarding the extent to which artificial intelligence possesses the capacity to comprehend the world and articulate its opinions, as humans do through reading, listening, speaking, and writing. As individuals engaged in the research or engineering of artificial intelligence, it is incumbent upon us to consistently address these queries, striving towards enabling machines to process intricate information even more effectively than human beings.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: According to researchers’s finding, visual information makes up around 80% of our total gain of information. In the era of multimedia, this ratio might be even higher. Correspondingly, computer vision has always been one of the most important component of artificial intelligence. Within computer vision, generative models has always been under extensively research, as it directly demonstrate how machine can create and express visual information.

Based on the findings of researchers, it has been established that visual information accounts for approximately 80% of the total information we acquire. In the current multimedia era, this proportion may even be higher. Consequently, computer vision stands out as an integral component of artificial intelligence. Specifically, generative models within computer vision have received considerable attention in extensive research endeavors, as they directly showcase how machines can generate and articulate visual information.

Based on the findings of researchers, Consistent advancement of generative models can successfully answer the aforementioned question about AI’s capability of express itself, especially, it is now steping into a multimodal era, combined with other data including texts. Furthermore, generative models has already significantly boost people’s efficiency, especially in some works related to designing and art creation.

Based on the research findings, the continual progress of generative models offers a viable solution to the earlier question regarding AI's capacity to express itself. This becomes even more evident as generative models now transition into a multimodal era, incorporating various data types such as texts. Moreover, it is worth noting that generative models have already made significant contributions to enhancing human efficiency, particularly in domains relevant to design and art creation.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: Consistent advancement of generative models can successfully answer the aforementioned question about AI’s capability of express itself, especially, it is now steping into a multimodal era, combined with other data including texts. Furthermore, generative models has already significantly boost people’s efficiency, especially in some works related to designing and art creation.

The continuous progression of generative models effectively addresses the previously mentioned inquiry regarding AI's expressive capabilities. This is particularly noteworthy as these models now enter a multimodal era, where they merge various data modalities, including texts. Additionally, it is worth highlighting that generative models have already made substantial contributions in enhancing human efficiency, specifically within domains associated with design and art creation.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: After four years of research and work revolving genrative models, I would like to pursue a research role in the realm of genrative models under multimodal context, via applying for the doctorate program at University of T.

Following an extensive four-year period dedicated to researching and delving into the intricacies of generative models, I am deeply inclined to pursue a research-oriented position within the realm of generative models, particularly in the context of multimodality. Hence, it is with great enthusiasm that I express my intention to apply for the esteemed doctorate program at the University of T.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: Four years ago, I developed my interests in genrative models in the undergradate internship at Chinese Academy of Science, the Institute of Automation. Originally, I was working on optical character recognition (OCR). However, during reading papers related to scene texts, I found that synthesis of scene texts really interesting, since it not only include image synthesis, but also natural language processing.

Four years ago, my profound fascination with generative models took root during my undergraduate internship at the Chinese Academy of Sciences, specifically within the esteemed Institute of Automation. Initially, my focus was on optical character recognition (OCR); however, as I delved into papers pertaining to scene texts, I discovered an intriguing field: synthesis of scene texts. This captivating area captures my attention due to its encompassment of both image synthesis and natural language processing, intertwining multiple disciplines.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: I chose the topic of style transfer for scene text with different textual content as research topic and wrote my undergraduate thesis. I work out my thesis with great effort and it helped me to be nominated as one of the outstanding graduates of my school. From then, I found the charm of generative models really interesting, and decided to continue contributing to this topic.

Delving into my undergraduate thesis, I ardently selected the topic of style transfer for scene texts encompassing diverse textual content. With utmost dedication, I painstakingly crafted my thesis, resulting in my nomination as one of the outstanding graduates from my institution. This gratifying experience revealed to me the captivating allure of generative models, solidifying my determination to forge ahead and make further contributions to this field.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: After my undergraduate study, I went to various places to continue my pursuit of computer vision and generative models. In 2020, I attended to University of California, Berkeley’s master program, and major in visual computing.

Subsequent to the successful completion of my undergraduate studies, I embarked on a diverse journey to broaden my knowledge and expertise in computer vision and generative models. In 2020, I had the privilege of enrolling in the prestigious master's program in visual computing at the University of California, Berkeley. This opportunity has allowed me to delve deeper into the intricacies of my chosen field.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: I worked on the project named Assistive Technology for Navigation, Selection, Pointing and Clicking in a Mouse-free Environment. supervised by Prof. Brian Barsky. I mainly concentrated on using end-to-end deep learning methods to solve gesture recognition, and used their information to control the cursor on the screen. I not only focus on single-frame gesture recognition, but also more complicated tasks including multi-frame (video) recogntion.

Under the astute guidance of Prof. Brian Barsky, I devoted myself to a significant project titled "Assistive Technology for Navigation, Selection, Pointing, and Clicking in a Mouse-free Environment." This endeavor primarily revolved around leveraging end-to-end deep learning techniques to tackle the intricate challenge of gesture recognition. Specifically, I directed my attention towards harnessing the invaluable insights derived from these models to efficiently manipulate the on-screen cursor. In addition to emphasizing single-frame gesture recognition, I ventured into more intricate territory by tackling multi-frame (video) recognition tasks.
Please make following words more cohesive and formal: Additionally, I developed a controlling system to match gesture information with specific command to control the cursor on the screen.

Furthermore, I spearheaded the development of a sophisticated control system designed to seamlessly correlate gesture information with specific commands, enabling precise control over the on-screen cursor.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: I believe although it is not a project directly related to generative models, but it offers me with great insights in a wide range of computer vision tasks. it is a fact that generative models’ pipeline are including more and more computer vision tasks, and taking a research in them can help me to discover more interdisciplinary innovation, supporting me to suceed in the future research.

While not directly aligned with generative models, I firmly believe that my involvement in this project imparts invaluable insights into various computer vision tasks. It is evident that generative models' pipeline progressively encompasses an expanding array of computer vision tasks. Therefore, conducting research in these areas not only fosters interdisciplinary innovation but also enhances my chances of achieving success in future research endeavors.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: My research experience related to computer vision and generative models are not limited in my academic experience. During my research internship at Baidu Inc, a coperation well-known for its artificial intellgence development, I concentrated on few-shot font generation, a popular but more challenging tasks under image generation.

My involvement in computer vision and generative models extends beyond my academic pursuits. Notably, during my research internship at Baidu Inc, a renowned company spearheading the development of artificial intelligence, I dedicated myself to the realm of few-shot font generation. This particular endeavor, while immensely popular, presents inherent challenges within the domain of image generation.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: I actively participated in design the cross-attention based feature merging module, which helped the model to effectively match the local fine-grained information with similar structures. Additionally, I designed a reference selection strategy, an straightforward algorithm to generate training datasets for style and content images based on depth-first searching approach.

I actively contributed to the design and implementation of the cross-attention based feature merging module, a pivotal component that facilitated the effective alignment of local, fine-grained information with analogous structures within the model. Furthermore, I devised a reference selection strategy, employing a straightforward algorithm based on a depth-first searching approach. This strategy enabled the generation of training datasets for style and content images, streamlining the process and ensuring the desired outcomes.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: we published this work as a conference paper X in the conference of CVPR 2022. I want to highlight that such research provide me insights of feature merging using cross-attention flexibly, which is a very useful method in renowned generative models, such as diffusion models with multimodal context.

We successfully presented and published this research as a conference paper titled "X" at the esteemed CVPR 2022 conference. It is imperative to emphasize that this study has garnered valuable insights into the flexible utilization of cross-attention-based feature merging techniques. Such methods hold immense utility within renowned generative models, including diffusion models that operate within a multimodal context.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: After graduation, I joined Data Center and Aritificial Intelligence Group at Intel, where I get to known more about model compression techniques as well as applications of large language models and latent diffusion models. Such interdiscplinary working content offers me more oopprtunities to continue my pursuit on generative models.

Following my graduation, I secured a position at Intel's Data Center and Artificial Intelligence Group. This professional venture enabled me to delve deeper into the realm of model compression techniques, as well as explore the wide-ranging applications of large language models and latent diffusion models. Engaging in this interdisciplinary work environment has provided me with valuable opportunities to further advance my expertise and continue my dedicated pursuit of generative models.

Please make following words more cohesive and formal: Since I have a background of generative models, I am always highly-motiveted to explore in some advanced topics, including personalized content generation based on text-to-image tasks. Furthermore, I support some efficient finetuning strategy in our product and I decide to continue my research within this fantastic realm.

With a solid background in generative models, I am consistently driven to delve into advanced topics, particularly in the realm of personalized content generation based on text-to-image tasks. The prospect of exploring these cutting-edge areas fuels my motivation and ambition. Moreover, I actively contribute to our product by supporting efficient finetuning strategies. This valuable hands-on experience further inspires my determination to forge ahead and continue my research within this captivating domain.
